name: Grosvenor Park I
approxRentRange: $1,890-$3,100/mo for 2BR (Zumper median $2,655 as of April 2026; individual owner listings range widely; many include all utilities)
bathroomsNote: Two 2BR configurations: 2BR/1BA and 2BR/2BA. Recent listings show both; 2BA units are larger (1,100-1,208 sqft).

notes.building: 16-story condominium tower built 1964; 398 units; individually owned units rented by owners (not centrally managed rental building). Part of the larger Grosvenor Park complex. Walking distance to Grosvenor-Strathmore Metro (Red Line). On-site Grosvenor Market grocery store.
notes.buildingType: Condo: units are individually owned and rented privately. No single leasing office; listings appear on Zillow, Apartments.com, and through individual agents. The Rockville Real Estate Exchange site aggregates available rentals.
notes.doorman: Multiple sources confirm 24/7 staffed front desk plus overnight security patrols 8pm-4am. The Zumper listing and RRREX both cite '24/7 concierge.' C21 listing confirms '24/7 concierge, overnight security (10 p.m.-6 a.m.).'
notes.balcony: Present in many units but not universal. Multiple active listings explicitly mention balconies (e.g., unit 1009 has 'large northwest-facing balcony with sweeping sunset views'; unit 711 listed with 'balcony with water and lush greenery views'). Not guaranteed for every unit; verify by floor plan.
notes.inUnitLaundry: No in-unit washers or dryers. Building has communal laundry facilities (electronic card payment). Confirmed by Rockville Real Estate Exchange.
notes.pets: Cats permitted (case-by-case basis; some listings add fees). Dogs not allowed. Cage pets permitted within reason. Confirmed by multiple sources.
notes.unitClimate: HOA condo fees for owners explicitly cover air conditioning, electricity, heat, gas, water, and sewer. For renters, whether utilities are bundled into rent depends on the individual owner-landlord. Many rental listings advertise 'all utilities included.' Whether the building controls HVAC centrally or each unit has individual control is not documented in available sources.
notes.wellMaintained: 4.1-star aggregate rating (Birdeye, 73 reviews; sourced mostly from Google). C21 listing and Howard Hanna descriptions present renovated units with updated kitchens and baths. One older negative Superpages review cited basement odors and noise from window AC units, but dated ~17 years ago. Insufficient recent independent resident feedback to confirm current condition confidently.
notes.packageRoom: Not mentioned in any source reviewed. Building has front desk staffing 24/7, which may handle packages informally, but no dedicated package room is documented.
notes.amenities: Outdoor pool, tennis courts, fitness center/exercise room, rooftop lounge (rentable), garden room with kitchen, bicycle storage, rooftop courtyard, small library, grilling area, additional storage units (rentable). Underground and surface parking available.
notes.rentNote: Because this is a condo building with individual landlords, rent and included utilities vary unit to unit. Listings from 2025-2026 range from ~$1,890 (2BR/2BA, utilities included) to ~$3,100. Many landlords include all utilities in rent because their HOA fees already cover them.
